subcodes.first_line: O thou whom I have loved since the tenderness of my earliest youth! The face of the verdant realm hath been illumined by the light streaming from the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من احببته منذ نعومه اظفاری قد تهلل وجه الخضراء بالنور الفائض من ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
